title: Procedure
description: Represents a clinical procedure performed on a patient, including surgeries, dental work, diagnostics, and therapeutic interventions.

cost.description: Cost information for this procedure. Optional — useful for pet owners tracking health expenses.

code.description: Coded representation of the procedure using a standardized terminology system.

system.description: The coding system used (e.g., SNOMED-CT-vet, CPT-vet, internal).

value.description: The procedure code within the specified system.

display.description: Human-readable display text for the code.

agent.description: Name of the anesthetic agent used.

resource_type.description: Fixed resource type identifier for this schema.

id.description: Unique identifier for the procedure record. UUID recommended.

patient_id.description: Reference to the patient on whom the procedure was performed.

encounter_id.description: Reference to the encounter during which the procedure was performed.

category.description: The high-level category of the procedure.

performed_date.description: Date and time when the procedure was performed or started.

end_date.description: Date and time when the procedure ended.

practitioner_id.description: Reference to the practitioner who performed the procedure. Must match an id in the top-level practitioners array.

examples: Successful. Patient recovered well from anesthesia.

complications.description: Any complications that occurred during or after the procedure.

examples: E-collar to be worn for 10 days. Suture removal in 14 days.
